top_signals.title: Asian Stocks Slip After Two-Day Rally, Yen Steady: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Asian equities edged lower as investors turned cautious after a rally in chipmakers and other tech stocks helped propel them to their best quarter in 17 years.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: UK banks’ digital ID bid is a game of optics – and the odds are not in their favour
top_signals.summary: A digital ID row has dominated headlines in the last year, and banks are set to join the row. In this week’s column, Samuel Norman takes a look at what they might be in for. Britain’s banks have voluntarily thrown themselves into one of the most toxic culture wars of the decade. Few subjects evoke [...]

Million-dollar homes, luxury bags and Lamborghinis: Florida man pleads guilty in crypto fraud scheme
top_signals.summary: A man pleaded guilty to fraud charges after prosecutors said he tricked people into the promise of making returns in crypto liquidity pools.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: China's Energy Future Runs on Coal and Solar
top_signals.summary: China will continue spending heavily on both coal and alternative energy, such as wind and solar, over the next five years, Beijing’s latest five-year plan revealed this month. The apparent paradox sees the world’s largest emitter by far continue to generate a solid portion of its energy from coal while also boosting the largest alternative energy capacity in the world. The thing is, it is not actually a paradox. Ever since the signing of the Paris Agreement in 2015, a host of countries have been working hard to reduce their reliance…

top_signals.title: Serena Williams beaten at Wimbledon in first singles match in four years
top_signals.summary: Williams has captured the imagination of the sports world with her sensational comeback, but there was no storybook chapter to add to her astonishing career.
